subject: English
title: Extended Reading Passages with Questions – Mijbil the Otter
instructions: Read each passage carefully. Answer the questions using information only from the given paragraph.

Passages.paragraph: During a visit to Iraq, Gavin Maxwell came across a baby otter that had been separated from its family. He decided to take it home with him to raise and care for it.
questions: Who is Gavin Maxwell?
Where did he find the baby otter?
What condition was the otter in?
Why did he decide to take it home?
Which words show care and concern?

Passages.paragraph: The otter, named Mijbil, quickly adapted to his new environment. He learned to play, eat, and interact with Maxwell and his family, showing intelligence and affection.
questions: What is the otter’s name?
How did Mijbil adapt to his new home?
What behaviors show his intelligence?
Which words indicate affection?
Why is this paragraph important for understanding Mijbil’s character?

Passages.paragraph: Maxwell trained Mijbil to swim and explore safely. The otter enjoyed running around, diving in water, and playing games, bringing joy to everyone around.
questions: What activities did Maxwell train Mijbil to do?
How did Mijbil enjoy his new environment?
Which words show excitement and playfulness?
What effect did Mijbil have on people?
Why is this paragraph significant in the story?

Passages.paragraph: Despite being an exotic pet, Mijbil developed a strong bond with Maxwell. The otter’s playful nature and curiosity made him a beloved companion.
questions: What kind of relationship did Mijbil have with Maxwell?
Which words show the otter’s playful nature?
Why was Mijbil considered a beloved companion?
How did curiosity contribute to the otter’s character?
What is the main idea of this paragraph?

Passages.paragraph: Over time, Mijbil grew bigger and stronger, but his loyalty and playful behavior remained. Maxwell cherished the memories of raising the otter, highlighting the bond between humans and animals.
questions: How did Mijbil change over time?
What qualities remained in the otter?
Which words show loyalty and playfulness?
How did Maxwell feel about Mijbil?
What is the main idea of this paragraph?
